creator: sheldonh@iafrica.com
text:
Hi Rajesh,

I've tried to reproduce this unsuccessfully with XFree86-3.3.3.1 and a
range of shells. I presume you experienced this problem with the
XFree86-3.3.3 port / package? 

Could you try to reproduce this with XFree86-3.3.3.1 and feed back? If
it's still a problem, let us know what your TERM environment variable is
set to and what version of which shell you use. Output from xterm -v
would also help.

Get back to us either way.

Thanks,
Sheldon.
